goal: Extract packages/dashboard-surface from apps/planning-app/app/(dashboard) routes. Surface contains: daily entry, handoffs list, next-action panel, today's sprint tasks. Accepts DataSourceAdapter prop (gad-CLI-backed for desktop, fetch-backed for web). Every section gets SiteSection cid=dashboard-<section>-site-section + grep-able interaction tokens. Refactors apps/planning-app to import from @portfolio/dashboard-surface. Tests: both hosts render identical DOM shape; VCS audit passes.
resolution: Created packages/dashboard-surface with HandoffsPanel + ProjectsPanel (prop-driven, host-agnostic). ProjectDrawer/PickupPanel deferred — deep internal logic, see index.ts comments. Added @portfolio/dashboard-surface dep to apps/platform and apps/desktop. Build + typecheck clean.
